ddls:
CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the measurement */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the measurement */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Accurate timestamp of the measurement */,
  "ignore" INTEGER /* Ignore flag, indicating if the measurement should be disregarded */,
  "cmt0_25" REAL /* Measurement value for cmt0.25 */,
  "cmt2" REAL /* Measurement value for cmt2 */,
  "cmt3" REAL /* Measurement value for cmt3 */,
  "cmt5" REAL /* Measurement value for cmt5 */,
  "cmt7" REAL /* Measurement value for cmt7 */,
  "cmt10" REAL /* Measurement value for cmt10 */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the measurement was taken */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source (sensor) used for the measurement */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the measurement */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the measurement location */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the measurement */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the measurement */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the measurement */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the measurement */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement type (e.g., CMT0.25) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., ppm, µg/m³) */,
  "measurement_scale" TEXT /* Scale of the measurement (e.g., linear, logarithmic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Sensor A) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" INTEGER /* Status of the last calibration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement this reading is associated with */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement type */,
  "value" REAL /* The actual value observed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Accurate timestamp of the reading */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the reading location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the reading location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the reading location */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions during the reading */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the reading */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of the reading */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the reading */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of the reading */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_readings_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_readings_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation record */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement being validated */,
  "validated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who validated the measurement */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the measurement is valid */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments provided during the validation process */,
  "validation_method" TEXT /* Method used for validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validated_by FOREIGN KEY ("validated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_measurements" (
  "project_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the project-measurement association */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement associated with the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the measurement in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis (e.g., statistical, machine learning) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the analysis */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the analysis result */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_analysis_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id")
)
